scripts.qa:full: npx tsx tests/s10-audit.test.ts && npm run lint:amf && npm run build
scripts.lint:amf: bash -c "! grep -rn 'devriez\|recommandons\|vous devez\|il faut que\|conseillons\|assurez-vous\|priorisez\|plan d.action' lib/ public/ app/ --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.js' --include='*.html' | grep -vi 'NEVER use\|forbidden\|interdits\|lint:amf\|grep\|devez savoir\|/devriez\|ai-prompt\|ai-constants'"
